vehicle.label: Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair
vehicle.desc: Wearable force-feedback exo-glove pair for VR grasp resistance, serviceable actuator cartridges, linkages, wrist band, and dorsal control module

parts.label: Dorsal Control Module x 2
parts.spec: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits

parts.label: Finger Exo Linkage Cartridge x 10
parts.spec: Two-segment exoskeleton finger linkage cartridge, single-pin removable, hinge datum pads, thimble slip interface

parts.label: Flexion-Resistance Actuator x 10
parts.spec: Plug-in tendon brake/clutch actuator module, knuckle row mount, cable pulley, connector pocket, service access

parts.label: Adjustable Wrist Band x 2
parts.spec: Quick-release wrist band, cable raceway, soft-contact interface, buckle, dorsal module anchor

parts.label: Cable Raceway + Harness Cover x 2
parts.spec: Snap-fit cable routing cover from wrist band to fingers, strain relief slots, inspection windows

parts.label: Finger Thimble Interface Set
parts.spec: Replaceable fingertip thimbles, slip-clearance sockets, soft liner cue, per-finger label and hinge pin access

parts.label: Palm Sensor Plate x 2
parts.spec: Palm-side flex/bend sensor channel plate, IMU mount pad, per-finger sensor channel exits, sensor connector pocket, washable liner interface

parts.label: Battery + Power Module x 2
parts.spec: Wrist battery pocket with quick-swap door, li-ion pack 2S 18650, BMS access window, power connector keying, charge LED window

parts.label: Wiring Loom + Service Loop Set
parts.spec: Knuckle-crossing wiring loom with service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, flex-rated bend radius, power vs signal channel separation

parts.label: Knuckle Mount Rail x 2
parts.spec: Dorsal knuckle row mounting rail, actuator plug-in pockets, datum pads per finger station, fastener pattern and removal path

parts.label: Fit Calibration + Safety Release Set
parts.spec: Wearable_structure closure module: wrist_quick_release, soft_liner_zone, finger_clearance gauges, don/doff datum labels, emergency release pull tab

parts.label: Service Port + Flex-Wiring Inspection Cover
parts.spec: Flex_wiring closure module: service_loop inspection cover, strain_relief, bend_radius_note, connector keying, charge/debug service port, power vs signal separation label

generated_parts.label: Dorsal Control Module x 2

requirements: Subsystem module: Dorsal Control Module x 2 (fixed BOM item inside Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair)
Spec: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits
Vehicle context: Wearable force-feedback exo-glove pair for VR grasp resistance, serviceable actuator cartridges, linkages, wrist band, and dorsal control module
Suggested material: PETG + TPU + PA12, process: FDM + SLS

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

verify.value: All required evidence_features present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: Adjacent-module interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and connection details.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels.
verify.rule: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles, with the separation visible in routing geometry.

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues if heat sink faceplate is not properly aligned with battery cavity.
risk.mit: Ensure proper alignment during assembly and conduct thermal testing.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance between PCB and enclosure walls leading to short circuits.
risk.mit: Maintain minimum clearance requirements and conduct electrical safety tests.

risk.desc: Risk of improper cable routing causing interference with moving parts.
risk.mit: Implement cable management solutions and conduct thorough routing reviews.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during snap-fit assembly leading to structural weakness.
risk.mit: Conduct assembly trials and refine snap-fit tolerances.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for maintenance and repair.
risk.mit: Increase size of service access cutouts and ensure ease of access.

requirements: Plug-in tendon brake/clutch actuator module, knuckle row mount, cable pulley, connector pocket, service access
Removable battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules
Harnesses, tubes, or service channels routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover

Flexion-resistance actuator modules plug in and remain visible near knuckle row
Rigid mock assembly preserves soft-contact cues, wrist quick release, and ergonomic clearance
Finger and wrist wiring uses service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, and a stated bend radius sized for repeated flexion cycles
